description: In the aftermath, Hale is seen reporting to the Confederacy, vowing she has acquired the final piece to her plan. The Confederacy reminds her of the consequences of failure, issuing a veiled threat with the Odium. The episode closes on this ominous note, teeing up further threats to come.

transcript.line: Still empty-handed. You see how your lack of results could be construed as ineptitude.
If you thought less of me, I wouldn't be here.
You're here because the Confederacy allows it. You want a seat at the table, you must prove you are deserving of it.
I've secured what I believe to be the final piece. It's all within reach.
No, I'd die before that happened.

Well, before you do that, there's a tradition within the Confederacy. If one faces failure, you drink the Odium. Fight your last in a wave of savage glory. But if your resolve is as strong as you claim, you'll have no need of it. I hope fortune turns your way. And, of course, hail HYDRA.
